---
title: "From Feeds to Trails"
author: "Kenny Peng, Erica Chiang, Sophie Greenwood, Jon Kleinberg, Nikhil Garg"
date: "2026-04-15"
date-added: "2026-04-16"
categories: [social-media, information, hypertext, AI, design, internet]
status: to-read
url: "https://leaflet.pub/p/did:plc:ldmcdu57vnkqriwqojr2lcqc/3mjk4e6aok22m"
---

An argument for redesigning social media interfaces from feeds (passive, one-directional) to trails (active, interconnected). Drawing on Bush's Memex, Nelson's hypertext, and the early Web, the authors propose using LLMs to blaze associative trails through social media — a prototype built on Bluesky at skytrails.org.

[Read the full article →](https://leaflet.pub/p/did:plc:ldmcdu57vnkqriwqojr2lcqc/3mjk4e6aok22m)
